title: Global X Zero Coupon Bond 2034 ETF declares $0.178 dividend
content:
* Global X Zero Coupon Bond 2034 ETF (ZCBF [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ZCBF]) declares $0.178/share monthly dividend [https://www.globalxetfs.com/funds/ZCBF].
 	* 30-day SEC yield of 4.45%.
 	* Payable July 7; for shareholders of record July 1; ex-div July 1.
 	* See ZCBF Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ZCBF/dividends?source=news_bullet]
